Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Archlady]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The Archlady is a female human with gray-streaked hair and a Shadow in the form of a serpent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The Archlady is Emissary Kahn Mala.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Archlady released crackling lightning-sparrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Archlady is a silver Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The sword-Path Archlady is from Everwood and has a halo behind her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — An Archlady with a Blood Shadow in the form of a snake landed on a cliff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — An Archlady accompanies the Sage of Red Faith.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Archlady salutes the Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — An Archlady can focus on governing territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Archlady has navy hair the color of the deep ocean and skin like a summer sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — A human Archlady kneels before Northstrider and wears a scripted necklace and wristbands.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
